summary: Added EMA smoothing (alpha=0.85) for treble energy in renderLoop.ts to prevent flicker. Enhanced particleField.ts with four distinct treble-driven detail effects: per-particle sparkle shimmer via phase-offset size pulsing, micro-jitter on render position only (no accumulation), increased brightness range (50 + treble*30), and alpha/opacity variation via hsla(). All effects are visibly distinct from bass macro-motion. 6 new tests (T-019-01 through T-019-06) verify smoothing, 0-1 range, detail influence, bass/treble distinction, bounds safety, and no position drift. All 238 tests pass, build succeeds.
